title: Astro!
description: A small mod thats adds gravity related items, in the form of  mauveine - a netherite amethyst mix.
body:
# Overview

Astro is a small mod that adds a new armour type aswell as a few items, all surrounding mauveine, a combination of netherite scrap and amethyst clusters. By harnessing this power, you can move around in low gravity, and manipulate it.

This set works well in combination of other mods, so feel free to try it with other movement based items!

# Recipes


![Mauveine Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faddadff72cc1867a5d4f9b34e21873714165e6c.png)
![Mauveine Diadem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a13da27ef3794c24feb16a794b9e2480bf31224c.png)
![Mauveine Shoulder Pads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d49da1da67a798a8b38b05ec62751f330a737320.png)
![Mauveine Leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65f2c8833234f47c66ae3d0b79df0141dd8f482c.png)
![Mauveine Boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3076c55cea116b87200f2218d98e4cd73e47271.png)
![Mauveine Sabre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ba6724d8e16307a7bed4f1ae7fec97ba9c6d4ae.png)
![Gravity Bomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73ad106f0be9144a9d8e52d48155d21a4b1e964.png)

# Items
### Mauveine Armour

Mauveine armour reduces your gravity, depending on the amount you are wearing
- 1 piece = 70% gravity
- 2 pieces = 50% gravity
- 3 pieces = 30% gravity + gravity toggle
- 4 pieces = 30% gravity + gravity toggle
  
You can toggle between low gravity and normal gravity by holding shift with 3 or more pieces.

### Mauveine Sabre

The mauveine sabre is a quicker variant of the sword, with less damage.

### Low Gravity Bomb

The low gravity bomb leaves a radius of low gravity around for 6.5 seconds, causing all affected entities to be at 10% gravity. This can be ignored if you have 3 mauveine armour pieces equipped.

### High Gravity Bomb

The high gravity bomb leaves a radius of high gravity around for 6.5 seconds, causing all affected entities to be at 200% gravity. This can be ignored if you have 3 mauveine armour pieces equipped.
